name: BindingDB
description: BindingDB is a public, web-accessible database of measured binding affinities, focusing chiefly on the interactions of proteins considered to be candidate drug-targets with ligands that are small, drug-like molecules. BindingDB supports medicinal chemistry and drug discovery via literature awareness and development of structure-activity relations (SAR and QSAR); validation of computational chemistry and molecular modeling approaches such as docking, scoring and free energy methods; chemical biology and chemical genomics; and basic studies of the physical chemistry of molecular recognition. BindingDB also includes a small collection of host-guest binding data of interest to chemists studying supramolecular systems.
conditionsOfAccess: All data curated by BindingDB staff are provided under the Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License. Data imported from ChEMBL are provided under their Creative Commons Attribution-Share Alike 3.0 Unported License.
citeAs: Liu,T., Hwang, L., Burley,S.K., Nitsche,C.I., Southan,C., Walters,W.P., and Gilson,M.K. BindingDB in 2024: a FAIR knowledgebase of protein-small molecule binding data Nucleic Acids Research 53:D1633-D1644 (2025).

creator.name: Skaggs School of Pharmacy and Pharmaceutical Sciences

funder.name: National Institute of General Medical Sciences, National Institutes of Health

distribution.name: all_tsv_zip
distribution.description: All binding data in BindingDB as a tab-separated values file in a ZIP archive (3,205,717 measurements, 1,409,251 compounds, 11,414 targets; 525.54 MB, updated 2026-03-01).

distribution.name: all_tsv_fileset
distribution.description: TSV file extracted from BindingDB_All_202603_tsv.zip.

distribution.name: articles_tsv_zip
distribution.description: Only data curated from articles by BindingDB (17.82 MB, updated 2026-03-01). Same column schema as all_tsv_zip.

distribution.name: chembl_tsv_zip
distribution.description: Only data in BindingDB drawn from ChEMBL (326.48 MB, updated 2026-03-01). Licensed under CC BY-SA 3.0. Same column schema as all_tsv_zip.

distribution.name: patents_tsv_zip
distribution.description: Only data in BindingDB drawn from patents (156.43 MB, updated 2026-03-01). Same column schema as all_tsv_zip.

distribution.name: pubchem_tsv_zip
distribution.description: Only data in BindingDB drawn from PubChem (25.40 MB, updated 2026-03-01). Same column schema as all_tsv_zip.

distribution.name: pdspki_tsv_zip
distribution.description: Only data in BindingDB drawn from PDSP Ki (5.32 MB, updated 2026-03-01). Same column schema as all_tsv_zip.

distribution.name: covid19_tsv_zip
distribution.description: Covid-19 data in BindingDB (9.30 MB, updated 2026-03-01). Same column schema as all_tsv_zip.

distribution.name: csar_tsv_zip
distribution.description: Only CSAR data in BindingDB (130.62 KB, updated 2026-03-01). Same column schema as all_tsv_zip.

distribution.name: itc_tsv_zip
distribution.description: Only isothermal titration calorimetry (ITC) data in BindingDB, including host-guest systems (141.62 KB, updated 2026-03-01). Same column schema as all_tsv_zip.

distribution.name: ptaylorlab_tsv_zip
distribution.description: Only data directly provided by Prof. Palmer Taylor, UCSD (5.68 KB, updated 2026-03-01). Same column schema as all_tsv_zip.

distribution.name: all_2d_sdf_zip
distribution.description: All binding data with 2D compound structures (1.39 GB, updated 2026-03-01). SDF property schema documented in BindingDB-SDfile-Specification.pdf.

distribution.name: all_3d_sdf_zip
distribution.description: All binding data with 3D compound structures computed with Vconf (2.81 GB, updated 2026-03-01). SDF property schema documented in BindingDB-SDfile-Specification.pdf.

distribution.name: articles_2d_sdf_zip
distribution.description: BindingDB-curated articles data with 2D structures (35.17 MB, updated 2026-03-01). SDF property schema documented in BindingDB-SDfile-Specification.pdf.

distribution.name: articles_3d_sdf_zip
distribution.description: BindingDB-curated articles data with 3D structures (87.61 MB, updated 2026-03-01). SDF property schema documented in BindingDB-SDfile-Specification.pdf.

distribution.name: chembl_2d_sdf_zip
distribution.description: ChEMBL-sourced data with 2D structures (885.12 MB, updated 2026-03-01). Licensed CC BY-SA 3.0. SDF property schema documented in BindingDB-SDfile-Specification.pdf.

distribution.name: chembl_3d_sdf_zip
distribution.description: ChEMBL-sourced data with 3D structures (1.62 GB, updated 2026-03-01). Licensed CC BY-SA 3.0. SDF property schema documented in BindingDB-SDfile-Specification.pdf.

distribution.description: PTaylorLab UCSD data with 2D structures (7.59 KB, updated 2026-03-01). SDF property schema documented in BindingDB-SDfile-Specification.pdf.

distribution.name: target_fasta
distribution.description: FASTA format protein sequences for all protein targets in BindingDB (7.23 MB, updated 2026-02-02).

distribution.name: mysql_dump_zip
distribution.description: Full BindingDB database as a MySQL dump in a ZIP archive (276.16 MB, updated 2026-02-28).

distribution.name: oracle_dump_zip
distribution.description: Full BindingDB database as an Oracle dump in a ZIP archive. Discontinued as of 2025 (837.50 MB, updated 2025-03-26).

distribution.name: cid_txt
distribution.description: Mapping of BindingDB monomer (compound) IDs to PubChem CIDs. Two tab-separated columns, no header row (22.87 MB, updated 2026-03-05).

distribution.name: sid_txt
distribution.description: Mapping of BindingDB monomer (compound) IDs to PubChem SIDs. Two tab-separated columns, no header row (23.66 MB, updated 2026-03-05).

distribution.name: uniprot_txt
distribution.description: Mapping of BindingDB polymer (single protein) IDs to UniProt IDs. Tab-separated with header row (568.40 KB, updated 2026-03-05).

distribution.name: drugbank_txt
distribution.description: Mapping of BindingDB monomer (compound) IDs to DrugBank IDs. Two tab-separated columns, no header row (41.02 KB, updated 2026-03-05).

distribution.name: pubmed_txt
distribution.description: Collection of PubMed IDs in BindingDB. Single column, no header row (387.05 KB, updated 2026-03-08).

recordSet.name: binding_data
recordSet.description: Binding affinity measurements from BindingDB. Each row represents one binding measurement with ligand, target, affinity value, and provenance. Schema sourced from header of BindingDB_All_202603_tsv.zip. All subset TSV files share this same column structure.

field.name: reactant_set_id
field.description: Unique identifier for the binding measurement (Reactant Set ID).

extract.column: BindingDB Reactant_set_id

field.name: ligand_smiles
field.description: SMILES string representation of the ligand.

extract.column: Ligand SMILES

field.name: ligand_inchi
field.description: InChI string of the ligand.

extract.column: Ligand InChI

field.name: ligand_inchi_key
field.description: InChI Key of the ligand.

extract.column: Ligand InChI Key

field.name: monomer_id
field.description: BindingDB internal monomer (compound) identifier.

extract.column: BindingDB MonomerID

field.name: ligand_name
field.description: Name of the ligand as recorded in BindingDB.

extract.column: BindingDB Ligand Name

field.name: target_name
field.description: Name of the protein target.

extract.column: Target Name

field.name: target_source_organism
field.description: Source organism of the target protein.

extract.column: Target Source Organism According to Curator or DataSource

field.name: ki_nm
field.description: Inhibition constant Ki in nanomolar units.

extract.column: Ki (nM)

field.name: ic50_nm
field.description: Half-maximal inhibitory concentration IC50 in nanomolar units.

extract.column: IC50 (nM)

field.name: kd_nm
field.description: Dissociation constant Kd in nanomolar units.

extract.column: Kd (nM)

field.name: ec50_nm
field.description: Half-maximal effective concentration EC50 in nanomolar units.

extract.column: EC50 (nM)

field.name: kon
field.description: Association rate constant kon in M-1 s-1.

extract.column: kon (M-1-s-1)

field.name: koff
field.description: Dissociation rate constant koff in s-1.

extract.column: koff (s-1)

field.name: ph
field.description: pH at which the measurement was made.

extract.column: pH

field.name: temp_c
field.description: Temperature in Celsius at which the measurement was made.

extract.column: Temp (C)

field.name: curation_datasource
field.description: Source of the data: BindingDB curated, ChEMBL, PubChem, Patent, etc.

extract.column: Curation/DataSource

field.name: article_doi
field.description: DOI of the source article.

extract.column: Article DOI

field.name: entry_doi
field.description: DOI assigned to this BindingDB entry.

extract.column: BindingDB Entry DOI

field.name: pmid
field.description: PubMed identifier of the source article.

extract.column: PMID

field.name: pubchem_aid
field.description: PubChem BioAssay identifier (AID).

extract.column: PubChem AID

field.name: patent_number
field.description: Patent number if the data source is a patent.

extract.column: Patent Number

field.name: authors
field.description: Authors of the source publication.

extract.column: Authors

field.name: date_of_publication
field.description: Publication date of the source article or patent.

extract.column: Date of publication

field.name: date_in_bindingdb
field.description: Date this measurement was curated into BindingDB.

extract.column: Date in BindingDB

field.name: institution
field.description: Institution associated with the source publication.

extract.column: Institution

field.name: link_to_ligand
field.description: URL to the ligand record in BindingDB.

extract.column: Link to Ligand in BindingDB

field.name: link_to_target
field.description: URL to the target record in BindingDB.

extract.column: Link to Target in BindingDB

field.name: link_to_pair
field.description: URL to the ligand-target pair page in BindingDB.

extract.column: Link to Ligand-Target Pair in BindingDB

field.name: ligand_het_id_pdb
field.description: PDB HET group identifier for the ligand.

extract.column: Ligand HET ID in PDB

field.name: pdb_ids_complex
field.description: PDB structure IDs for the ligand-target complex (pipe-delimited if multiple).

extract.column: PDB ID(s) for Ligand-Target Complex

field.name: pubchem_cid
field.description: PubChem Compound identifier (CID) of the ligand.

extract.column: PubChem CID

field.name: pubchem_sid
field.description: PubChem Substance identifier (SID) of the ligand.

extract.column: PubChem SID

field.name: chebi_id
field.description: ChEBI identifier of the ligand.

extract.column: ChEBI ID of Ligand

field.name: chembl_id
field.description: ChEMBL identifier of the ligand.

extract.column: ChEMBL ID of Ligand

field.name: drugbank_id
field.description: DrugBank identifier of the ligand.

extract.column: DrugBank ID of Ligand

field.name: iuphar_grac_id
field.description: IUPHAR/BPS Guide to Pharmacology identifier.

extract.column: IUPHAR_GRAC ID of Ligand

field.name: kegg_id
field.description: KEGG compound identifier of the ligand.

extract.column: KEGG ID of Ligand

field.name: zinc_id
field.description: ZINC compound identifier of the ligand.

extract.column: ZINC ID of Ligand

field.name: num_protein_chains
field.description: Number of protein chains in the target.

extract.column: Number of Protein Chains in Target (>1 implies a multichain complex)

field.description: UniProt (TrEMBL) Submitted Name of Target Chain 1 (chain 1 of up to 6).
